data.body: We look at the expansion of Medicaid (across categories and income) to understand if these policies have increased or decreased uniformity in families. We find that (1) Expanding coverage for children does not increase uniformity (and may reduce it). However,
data.author: did:plc:gmiekknm5h735sldbylfucip
